prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Major Depressive Disorder
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 67.3 kg; Height 177.7 cm; BMI 21.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 9.7%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 9.8%), FPG (12 months ago 236mg/dL; 9 months ago 197mg/dL; 6 months ago 276mg/dL; 3 months ago 216mg/dL; current 255mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.2kg; 9 months ago 68.3kg; 6 months ago 64.8kg; 3 months ago 67.1kg; current 67.3kg), Height (12 months ago 177.7cm; 9 months ago 177.7cm; 6 months ago 177.7cm; 3 months ago 177.7cm; current 177.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 110U/L; 9 months ago 110U/L; 6 months ago 101U/L; 3 months ago 102U/L; current 107U/L), AST (12 months ago 89U/L; 9 months ago 96U/L; 6 months ago 87U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 92U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 417mg/g; 9 months ago 344mg/g; 6 months ago 370mg/g; 3 months ago 523mg/g; current 455mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 110mg/dL; current 103mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.77 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
